The '''Bakuran National Symphony''' was the most prestigious and elite [[Music/Legends|musical]] group on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. As it was the 'national' symphony, it was presumably located in the Bakuran [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]].

[[Malinza Thanas]], the daughter of former [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] [[Gaeriel Captison]] and [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]] commander [[Pter Thanas]], joined the Symphony at an unusually young age.

{{Music-stub}}
